## Repo to track

- **Org/Repo**: `org/repo`
- **URL**: https://github.com/org/repo
- **Stars**: <!-- current count -->
- **Language**: <!-- Python / TypeScript / Rust / etc. -->
- **License**: <!-- MIT / Apache-2.0 / GPL / etc. -->

## Why should we track this repo?

<!-- What makes this repo worth profiling? AI-friendly? Big community? Active maintainers? -->

## Expected merge rate (rough estimate)

<!-- Based on your experience, what's the merge rate like for external PRs? -->

- [ ] High (≥ 60%)
- [ ] Medium (30-60%)
- [ ] Low (10-30%)
- [ ] Very Low (< 10%)

## AI policy

<!-- How does the repo handle AI-assisted PRs? -->

- [ ] Welcoming (explicitly OK)
- [ ] Neutral (no policy stated)
- [ ] Restrictive (must declare / hide AI use)
- [ ] Hostile (rejects AI PRs)

## References

- CONTRIBUTING.md: <!-- link -->
- Recent AI-assisted PR example: <!-- link -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else. -->
